---
title: "The Rev. George Sarawia"
---

## The Rev. George Sarawia

**Dates:** (1845-1901)

### Description

missionary

### Biography

When he was ordained in 1873 he became the first Melanesian to be ordained a priest.  He came from Mota.

### Letters

- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from December 21, 1868.
- Letter from January 22, 1868.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from March 23, 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
